step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Prevna 13 can be used in children because it is indicated for children aged 6 weeks through 5 years and up to 17 years for the prevention of invasive pneumococcal disease. Multiple sections confirm its use across various pediatric ages, including specific dosing guidelines for different age groups.
